text: Gaon mein be-mausam baarish se fasal barbaad ho gayi aur bank ki kist ruki hai, isliye maine is mahine ka apna sara kiraya aur kharcha remittance mein bhej diya. Metro city mein akele reh kar bhookha so jaunga par ghar walon ko apni tangi ke baare mein bata kar unki 'izzat' kam nahi hone dunga. Unhe yahi lagna chahiye ki unka beta shehar mein bohot khush hai taaki parivaar mein koi kalesh na ho.

Crop destroy hone ke baad Papa bohot pareshan thay, toh maine apna emergency fund aur bachi-kuchi savings wipe out karke gaon bhej di. Main financial pressure ke baare mein baat karke unhe guilt nahi dena chahta kyunki unhone kisan hokar meri padhai ke liye sahukaar se bohot karz liya tha. Language gap ki wajah se yahan dukh baant nahi sakta, par ghar ki 'shaan' bachane ke liye main ye remittance trap chup-chap seh lunga.

Mummy ka phone aaya ki loan installment repay nahi ho pa rahi, toh maine bina soche doston se udhaar lekar paise bhej diye taaki unhe lage ki mera kaam acha chal raha hai. UPSC aspirant toh nahi ban paya par is urban migration mein unka 'maan' banaye rakhna hi ab mera ekmatra maqsad hai. 'Log kya kahenge' agar unka shehar wala beta paise na bhej paye, is darr se main apni financial precarity hamesha chhupata hoon.

Chit fund mein Papa ke paise doobne aur khet sookhne ke baad, ghar ki saari umeed mujh par hai, isliye main apni salary ka 80% har mahine remittance mein bhej deta hoon. Meri apni vehicle EMI bounce hone ki kagar par hai, par main unhe sach bata kar unka bharosa nahi tod sakta. Rishton mein koi doori na aaye, isliye main is metro isolation mein ghut-ghut kar jeene ko taiyaar hoon.

Gaon mein sahukaar ka dabav badh gaya hai kyunki fasal na hone se karz nahi utar raha, isliye maine apne office ki bonus ka ek-ek rupaya ghar bhej diya. Main unse ye nahi keh sakta ki metro city mein mera guzara mushkil ho raha hai kyunki unhe lagta hai ki software job matlab bohot paisa. Unki khushi aur parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye main har mahine debt spiral mein dhasne ko manzoor hoon.
